---
title: "NBA Finals"
description: |
  BASKETS!
date: '2026-06-12'
image: "nbafinals.jpg"
categories:
    - Sports
    - Regional
    - Food
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
draft: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("packages.R"))
source(here("functions.R"))

series_filter = 15

data = pollresults(series_filter)
```

# Results coming soon! 

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Team")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Breakfast")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Meats")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Transport")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Seasons")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Grocery")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Catchphrase")
```
